summary: Dropshipping Module Complete Testing - All features verified and working. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows tested successfully.
passed_tests: API /api/auth/register/dropshipper - Registration with shop_name and shop_slug generation
API /api/auth/login - Dropshipper login and redirect to /dropshipper
API /api/dropshipper/catalog - Returns available products with search
API /api/dropshipper/products - CRUD operations for dropshipped products
API /api/admin/dropshippers - Admin can view all dropshippers
UI - Dropshipper registration page with all form fields
UI - Dropshipper dashboard with stats cards and navigation
UI - Catalog browsing with search and 'Ajouter' buttons
UI - Product customization modal with price and description
UI - My products page with margin display and toggle/delete actions
UI - Public shop page with product display and order modal
UI - Admin Dropshippers section with stats and list
seed_data_creation: Test dropshippers created during testing with TEST_ prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dropshipping module fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Dropshipper registration at /devenir-dropshipper creates user with shop_slug, 2) Dashboard at /dropshipper shows stats and navigation, 3) Catalog allows adding products with custom price (50/50 margin split), 4) Public shop at /boutique/{shop_slug} displays products with order modal, 5) Admin section shows dropshippers list with stats and toggle actions.

dropshipper_registration.notes: Creates user with role=dropshipper, generates shop_slug

dropshipper_dashboard.notes: Shows stats (products, orders, earnings), navigation sidebar

catalog_browsing.notes: Returns approved products with search, marks already-added products

product_customization.notes: Add product with custom price/description, 50/50 margin split calculated

margin_calculation.example: Original: 5,500 FCFA, Selling: 10,500 FCFA, Margin: 5,000 FCFA, Dropshipper share: 2,500 FCFA

public_shop.notes: Displays shop info and products, order modal with delivery form

admin_dropshippers.notes: Shows stats, list with toggle actions, recent transactions
